title: andryala crithmifolia subsp. coronopifolia
intro: Andryala crithmifolia subsp. coronopifolia is a lesser-known species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter taste. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Andryala crithmifolia subsp. coronopifolia include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for its medicinal and health benefits.
